analysis.core_story_summary: Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
audience_notes.teens_13_17: Connect events to decision-making, identity, and consequences.
audience_notes.young_adults_18_30: Highlight ethics, leadership, and social relevance.
audience_notes.devotional_traditional: Preserve sacred framing and theological terms respectfully.
audience_notes.global_general: Keep cultural context brief and avoid insider assumptions.

sensitivity_notes: Mostly suitable for broad audiences with light cultural context.

redesigned_story_by_demographic.children_8_12: **Mathura — Kids (8-12):** Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc. This story teaches actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Think of it like a legend that helps us choose kindness, courage, and respect.
redesigned_story_by_demographic.teens_13_17: **Mathura — Teens (13-17):** Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc. For teens, the key idea is actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. It shows how choices, discipline, and character shape outcomes.
redesigned_story_by_demographic.young_adults_18_30: **Mathura — Young Adults:** Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc. A modern takeaway is actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. redesigned_story_by_demographic.devotional_traditional: **Mathura — Devotional/Traditional Readers:** Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc. The episode highlights actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. redesigned_story_by_demographic.global_general: **Mathura — Global General Audience:** Describing the majesty of Mathura,lord Varaha told Prithvi- "Mathura is very dear to me because this is the very place where I shall be taking incarnation as Krishna. Mathura is the most sacro-sanct place and no other holy place can be compared to it. There are many other holy places in and around Mathura- Vishranti, Surya teerth,Koti teerth,Vayu teerth,etc. In universal terms, it explores actions have consequences, humility before higher wisdom. Cultural names are preserved while the message is presented in accessible contemporary English.
